beats: Lin Che descends into a basement area.
He sees a mirror covered with a cloth.
From behind the cloth, the sound of fingernails tapping glass is heard.

voiceover.speaker: Narrator
voiceover.text: In the basement, a mirror is covered with cloth. From behind it comes the sound of fingernails tapping glass.

prompt.positive: Wide shot of a dimly lit basement, Lin Che standing before a cloth-covered mirror, eerie atmosphere, single light source casting shadows, suspenseful composition.
